params.description: Static equation displayed: 6 × 5 = 30 with factor and product labels visible.

beats.text: You can compute products for 2s, 5s, and 10s. You know the patterns. You can build complete equations with factors and products.

elements.description: Static equation: 6 × 5 = 30 with factor and product labels visible.

beats.text: Next time, you'll see equations where one of the FACTORS is missing — like something times 5 equals 30. You'll figure out what's hiding. You're ready because you already know what these equations mean.

elements.description: Static equation: 6 × 5 = 30 with factor and product labels visible.
